creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Building mail/thunderbird-i18n 45.0 in poudriere with "bulk -t" fails in the check-plist stage:

===========================================================================
====>> Recording filesystem state for prestage... done
=======================<phase: stage          >============================
===>  Staging for thunderbird-i18n-45.0
===>   thunderbird-i18n-45.0 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/thunderbird/thunderbird - found
===>   thunderbird-i18n-45.0 depends on package: xpi-quick-locale-switcher>=0 - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/thunderbird-i18n/work/thunderbird-i18n-45.0; /bin/pax -rw . /wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/thunderbird-i18n/work/stage/usr/local/lib/xpi
/bin/chmod -R a+rX,go-w /wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/thunderbird-i18n/work/stage/usr/local/lib/xpi/langpack-*@thunderbird.mozilla.org/
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===========================================================================
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%XPI_LIBDIR%%/symlinks/firefox
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%XPI_LIBDIR%%/symlinks/linux-firefox
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%XPI_LIBDIR%%/symlinks/linux-seamonkey
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%XPI_LIBDIR%%/symlinks/linux-thunderbird
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%XPI_LIBDIR%%/symlinks/seamonkey
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%XPI_LIBDIR%%/symlinks/thunderbird
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/mail/thunderbird-i18n
